name: Front Run
ability: If your opponent has not used a Play in this Battle, your Hero gets +20.

name: Victory Dinner
ability: If you win this Battle, recover up to 3 Hot Dogs from your Discard Pile.

name: Get What You Pay For
ability: Pay as many Hot Dogs as you want to run this Play. Your Hero gets +10 for each Hot Dog you pay. (Ex: Pay 3 Hot Dogs, your Hero gets +30.)

name: It's Gonna Cost Ya
ability: Your Hero loses -15, but you can recover up to 2 Hot Dogs from your Discard Pile.

name: Deadline Deal
ability: Swap your Hero's current power with your opponent's current power in this Battle.

name: Late Game Push
ability: Play this on or before Battle 4. For the rest of the game, nothing changes until the start of Battle 7, when you recover all Hot Dogs from your Discard Pile.

name: Back From The Dumps
ability: Each player gets up to 3 Hot Dogs back from their Discard Pile.

name: Reload
ability: Pick up 1 Play you used in a previous Battle and add it back to your Hand.

name: Leave It To Chance
ability: For the rest of the game, your opponent must roll a dice after paying the Hot Dog cost to run a Play. If they roll a 2-5, they can run the Play. If they roll anything else, they cannot.

name: 4 New Plays Baby!
ability: Shuffle all the Plays in your hand back into your Playbook, then draw 4 new Plays.

name: Burn That Play
ability: Discard another Play from your hand and your Hero gets +10.

name: Cloudy With A Chance Of Hot Dogs
ability: Pick a number from 1 to 6 and roll a dice. If it lands on your number, Recover 4 Hot Dogs from your Discard Pile.

name: Play Booster
ability: Draw the same number of Plays as you've used in this Battle, including this one. (Ex: If you have run 2 Plays this Battle, draw 2 Plays.)

name: You're Not Alone
ability: For the rest of the game, whenever your opponent runs a Play, you can draw a Play from your Playbook.

name: No More Subs
ability: Your opponent can't Substitute for the rest of the game.

name: Locker Room Evacuation
ability: Reveal the top 5 Heroes from your Hero Deck. Add one to your hand and Discard the rest.

name: Deep In The Playbook
ability: For the rest of the Game, whenever a Player rolls a dice, they get to draw a Play from their Playbook.

name: Pay The Price
ability: For the rest of the Game, whenever a dice is rolled, the opponent's Hero loses -5.

name: Unlimited Subs
ability: For the rest of the Game all of your Substitutions are free.

name: Leave It To Fate
ability: Both players must send their Hero to the Discard Pile and replace them with the top card from their Hero Deck.

name: Ice Boost
ability: For the rest of the game, all Heroes with Ice weapons get +10.

name: Steel Boost
ability: For the rest of the game, all Heroes with Steel weapons get +10.

name: Fire Boost
ability: For the rest of the game, all Heroes with Fire weapons get +10.

name: Fire Roll
ability: If your Hero has a Fire weapon, roll a dice. If you roll a 4-6, your Hero gets +30.

name: Ice Roll
ability: If your Hero has an Ice weapon, roll a dice. If you roll a 4-6 your Hero gets +30.

name: Bigger Steel Roll
ability: If your Hero has a Steel weapon, roll a dice. If you roll a 5 or 6 your Hero gets +50.

name: By Any Means Necessary
ability: Search your Playbook and run any play for free. (Then, re-shuffle your Playbook.)

name: Pick On Someone Your Own Size
ability: Your Hero now has the same power as your Opponent's Hero's current power.

name: Dogpile
ability: Draw the top card from your Hero Deck and add its power to your Hero.

name: Noble Sacrifice
ability: This Hero's Power is now 0. All your Heroes gain +10 for the rest of the Game.

name: Buff Up 15
ability: Your Hero gets +15.

name: Opp Loses 15
ability: Your opponent's Hero loses -15.

name: Lose 1 To Win 2 (Hopefully)
ability: Your current Hero loses -50, but your next 2 Heroes each gain +15.

name: Luck Of The Draw
ability: Both players roll a dice; whoever rolls the highest number gets to play the top card from their Playbook for free if able.

name: Discarded Heroes
ability: Your Hero gets +10 for each Hero in your Discard Pile. (Ex: 3 Heroes = +30)

name: Make It, Take It
ability: For the rest of the game, whenever you win a Battle, your Hero in the next Battle gets +5.

name: Heads I Win, Tails You Lose
ability: Flip a coin: If heads, your Hero gets +15. If tails, your opponent's Hero loses -5.

name: Fairweather Fan
ability: Play this in Battle 5 or later. Your Hero gets +5 for each Battle you've won.

name: Flash Sale
ability: For this Battle and the next, all your Plays cost 1 less Hot Dog (including this one).

name: Ha! Gotcha
ability: Any Plays currently affecting your Hero's power now also affect your opponent's Hero in this Battle.

name: Pay It For Me
ability: If you choose to Substitute in the next Battle, your opponent must pay the 2 Hot Dog cost.

name: Only Upside
ability: Pick a number from 1 to 6, then roll a dice. If it lands on your number, your Hero gets +20. If not, draw a Play from your Playbook.

name: Recycle For 5
ability: Your Hero gets +5 power for every card in your Discard Pile, except Hot Dogs.

name: Steel Flipper
ability: Flip a coin: If heads, your Hero gets +10 power. If your Hero's weapon is Steel, draw 1 Play as well.

name: 2 Get 10
ability: Your Hero in this Battle and the next Battle gets +10.

name: 10/10 Unfair
ability: Your opponent's Hero loses -10 in this Battle, and your Hero in the next Battle gets +10.

name: I Get Some, You Get Some.
ability: Your Hero gets +10, but your opponent's Hero in the next Battle also gets +10.

name: I Get 1. You Lose 1.
ability: Draw a Play from your Playbook, then choose 1 random Play from your opponent's hand for them to Discard.

name: 3rd Time Charm
ability: Flip a coin 3 times. If all 3 flips land on heads, your Hero's Power is doubled. Each time the coin lands on tails, draw a Play.

name: Baby Phoenix
ability: If your Hero has a Fire weapon, after both players finish their turn, your Hero gets +10.

name: Steel Resolve
ability: If your Hero has a Steel weapon, after both players finish their turn, your Hero gets +15.

name: Only Fire
ability: For the rest of the game all Heroes have Fire Weapons.

name: Only Ice
ability: For the rest of the game all Heroes have Ice Weapons.

name: Only Steel
ability: For the rest of the game all Heroes have Steel Weapons.

name: Flame Wall
ability: If your Hero has a Fire weapon, your opponent can't run any Plays this Battle.

name: Icy Shield
ability: If your Hero has an Ice weapon, your opponent can't run any Plays this Battle.

name: Steel Defense
ability: If your Hero has a Steel weapon, your opponent can't run any Plays this Battle.

name: Indestructible
ability: This Hero can't have its power reduced by an opponent's Play.

name: Full Court Press
ability: Your opponent can't run any Plays this Battle.

name: Curveball
ability: Replace your Hero with any Hero from your hand and draw 1 Hero.

name: Add Firepower
ability: Flip a coin 4 times. For each heads, you can either draw a card (Hero or Play) or Recover a Hot Dog from your Discard Pile.

name: Going Back to Back
ability: This Hero gets any extra Power your previous Hero had.

name: Flip Ya For 2 Plays
ability: Flip a coin: If heads, you draw 2 Plays. If tails, your opponent draws 2 Plays.

name: Easy Choice
ability: No matter the outcome of this Battle, you decide who gets Honors (goes first) in the next Battle.

name: Dog Gone Inflation
ability: Your opponent's Plays each cost an extra 2 Hot Dogs for this Battle and the next Battle.

name: Tough Call
ability: Reveal the top 3 Plays of your Playbook; choose 1 and add it to your hand then Discard the other 2.

name: Don't Call It A Comeback
ability: Replace this Hero with any Hero from your Discard Pile.

name: Late-Game Magic
ability: You can only run this Play in Battle 5 or later; give your Hero +20.

name: Loan Sharked
ability: For the rest of the Game if a coin is flipped, lower the opponent's Hero in the active Battle by -5.

name: Pulling The Plug
ability: Any Plays that are affecting the rest of the Game are now cancelled going forward (including your own).

name: Rally Cap
ability: If your Hero in this Battle is losing by 15 or more it gets +20.

name: Rob Peter Pay Paul
ability: This Hero gets +15, but your Hero in the next Battle gets -5.

name: Shooters Shoot
ability: Flip a coin 4 times; your opponent's Hero gets -5 each time the coin lands on tails.

name: The Champion's Lasso
ability: Get 1 Hot Dog back from your Discard Pile for each Hot Dog your opponent uses (or has used) in this Battle.

name: To Fight Another Day
ability: If you lost the previous Battle, your Hero in the active Battle gets +20.

name: Win The Toss
ability: Flip a coin; if heads, run the top Play from your Playbook in this Battle for free (0 Hot Dog cost).

name: Gavel of Justice
ability: Lower the opponent's Hero by -30.

name: No Huddle
ability: If you ran a Play in the previous Battle, this Hero gets +15.

name: 1-4-1 Hero
ability: Draw a Hero from your Hero Deck.

name: 1-4-1 Play
ability: Draw a Play from your Playbook.

name: Adding Depth
ability: Draw a card from either your Playbook or your Hero Deck.

name: Crystal Ball
ability: Pick a number 1-6, then your opponent picks a different number 1-6; roll a die; if it lands on either player's number their Hero gets +30.

name: Double or Nothin'
ability: Flip a coin twice; if both land on heads, play the top card from your Hero Deck and add its power to the active Hero in this Battle.

name: Heads-Up!
ability: Flip a coin 4 times; your Hero gets +5 each time the coin lands on heads.

name: Jump Ball
ability: Flip a coin; if heads, your Hero gets +10, if tails, your Hero gets -10.

name: Late Game Lockdown
ability: Your opponent cannot Substitute in Battle 7.

name: Lucky 7
ability: Roll a die two times; if the numbers add up to 7 your Hero gets +100; if any other number you must Discard a random Hero from your hand.

name: Lucky Bounce
ability: Roll a die; your Hero gets +5x the number; (ex. If you roll a 3 your Hero gets +15).

name: Robin Who
ability: Steal -5 from your opponent's Hero and give +5 to your own Hero.

name: Pinch Hitter
ability: Next Battle you can Substitute for free (0 Hot Dog cost).

name: Prevent D
ability: Your opponent can't run any Plays in Battle 7.

name: Rebuild
ability: If you lost the previous Battle, Discard all Heroes in your hand and draw 4 new Heroes from your Hero Deck.

name: Waiver Wire Pickup
ability: Search your Hero Deck for any Hero with up to 100 power and add it to your hand.

name: Trash Bandit
ability: Recover 1 Hot Dog from your Discard Pile.

name: Worth The Risk?
ability: Roll a dice: if you get a 1 or 6, your Hero's power drops to 0. If you roll a 2-5, you gain +25.

name: Opps' Choice
ability: Send your Hero to the Discard Pile. Reveal the top 2 Heroes from your deck. Your opponent picks 1 to join the battle, and the other goes to your Discard Pile.

name: Immunity
ability: This Hero can't be affected in any way by your opponent's Plays.

name: Change The Future
ability: You can re-order your face-down Heroes in future Battles, but you can't look at them.

name: QB Sneak
ability: If this Battle is tied, your Hero gets +1.

name: Grilled Bandit
ability: For the rest of the game, if your opponent would recover Hot Dogs, you recover them instead.

name: The Closer
ability: If this is used in Battle 7, your Hero gets +40. If it's used in any other Battle, your Hero gets +25.

name: Banked Power
ability: After paying the Hot Dog cost of this Play, your Hero gets +5 for every Hot Dog you have left.

name: Hero Reset
ability: Your Hero's Power returns to its starting Power.

name: One And Done
ability: This must be the only Play you use this Battle. Your Hero gets +20.

name: Too Full To Fight
ability: If your opponent has 5 or more Hot Dogs, their Hero gets -15 and they lose 2 Hot Dogs.

name: Lineup Pressure
ability: Your opponent's Hero gets -5 for each Hero you've revealed so far.

name: Sacrifice And Scheme
ability: Draw 2 Plays and Discard 2 Heroes.

name: Momentum Breaker
ability: Your opponent's Hero gets -5 and they Discard 1 random Play.

name: Drain And Deny
ability: Your opponent's Hero gets -10 and they can't Recover Hot Dogs next Battle.

name: Free Booster
ability: Your Hero gets +20. If you didn't run any Plays last Battle, this Play costs 0. This Play can't be used in Battle 1.

name: Momentum Meal
ability: If you win this Battle, Recover Hot Dogs equal to the number of Plays you used this Battle which cost 2 or more. (Max 3).

name: Hero Tax
ability: Your opponent must pay 1 Hot Dog for each Hero in their hand. If they can't, they must Discard a random Hero instead.

name: Sack Streak
ability: Roll a dice once. If you roll a 4-6, your opponent's Hero gets -15. You may roll again until you roll a 1-3.

name: Running On Fumes
ability: If you have 1 or 0 Hot Dogs left, your Hero gets +15.

name: Rich Get Richer
ability: If you have 6 or more Hot Dogs left, Recover 1 Hot Dog and Draw 1 Play.

name: Overcommited
ability: Next Battle, your opponent's Hero gets -5 for every Play they run.

name: Belly Buster
ability: If your opponent has an equal or greater number of Hot Dogs than you before paying this Play's Hot Dog cost, their Hero gets -10.

name: Emergency Shutdown
ability: If you have 2 or fewer Hot Dogs, cancel all Plays affecting the rest of the game.

name: Double-Edged Flip
ability: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Hero gets -15. If tails, your opponent's next Hero gets -15.

name: Overextended
ability: Your opponent's Hero gets -10. If your opponent has used 2 or more Plays this Battle, they also lose 1 Hot Dog.

name: Battle Back
ability: Your Hero gets +15. If your opponent has won more Battles than you, Draw 1 Play.

name: Weapon Tangle
ability: If your opponent's Hero has a different weapon type than yours, your Hero gets +15. If they are the same, your Hero gets +20.

name: Hexvantage
ability: Your Hero gets +5 Power. If it has a Hex weapon, it gets +20.

name: Trade-Up
ability: Discard a Play from your hand to Draw 2 new Plays.

name: Baseline Bonus
ability: If your Hero's current Power is the same as its starting Power, your Hero gets +10.

name: Consolation Combo
ability: If your Hero loses this Battle, Draw 1 Play and Recover 1 Hot Dog.

name: Quick Draw
ability: If you run this Play before Battle 3, Draw 2 Plays. If not, Draw 1 Play.

name: Weapon-Sync
ability: If your previous Hero and your current Hero share a weapon type, your Hero gets +20. Otherwise, Draw 1 Play.

name: Synergy Snacks
ability: If your previous 2 revealed Heroes shared a weapon type, Recover 2 Hot Dogs.

name: Wildcard Wager
ability: Draw 1 Play. If it costs 1 or less, you may play it immediately for free. If the cost is 2 or higher, Discard it.

name: Big Time Recruit
ability: Reveal the top 3 Heroes of your Hero Deck. Choose one to add to your hand, then shuffle the rest back into your Hero Deck.

name: Comeback Time
ability: If you lost the 2 previous Battles, your Hero gets +15.

name: Dice Duel
ability: Both Players roll a dice. Whoever rolls a higher number gets +25. If tied, both get -10.

name: High Stakes Pump-Up
ability: Your Hero gets +10. If you lose this Battle, your Hero in the next Battle gets -20.

name: Pick Your Poison
ability: If you lost the previous Battle, your opponent must pay 1 Hot Dog at the start of the next Battle or Discard a Play.

name: Snack Sanction
ability: For the rest of the game, neither Player can Recover more than 1 Hot Dog per Battle.

name: Bun Shortage
ability: For the rest of the game, neither Player can Recover any Hot Dogs.

name: Burn To Burn
ability: Discard a Play. If you do, your opponent loses 2 Hot Dogs.

name: Catch-Up Bonus
ability: Your Hero gets +10. If your opponent has more Hot Dogs than you after you've paid this Play's cost, Recover 1 Hot Dog.

name: Buff Or Debuff
ability: After paying this Play's cost, if your opponent has more Hot Dogs than you, your Hero gets +15. If you have more than them, their Hero gets -15.

name: Glowaway
ability: Discard a Hero with a Glow weapon from your hand. Your Hero gets +25.

name: Playbook Knowledge
ability: Reveal the top 2 Plays of your opponent's Playbook. Put one back on top and send 1 to the bottom.

name: Scare Tactics
ability: If you have Honors, reveal a Play from your hand. You may use it for free next Battle if your opponent uses a Play with equal or greater cost.

name: Weapon Lineage
ability: Your current Hero gets +10 for every Hero in your Discard Pile with the same weapon type.

name: Delayed Recovery
ability: Choose one of your unrevealed Heroes. When that Hero is revealed, it gets -10 but you Recover 2 Hot Dogs.

name: Second Wind
ability: Shuffle your entire Discard Pile (excluding Hot Dogs) back into your deck. Draw 2 Plays.

name: Protein Bar
ability: Your Hero gets +15. If you lose this Battle, Recover 1 Hot Dog.

name: Different Leagues
ability: If your Hero's weapon type is different from your opponent's, their Hero gets -10.

name: Refill And Reload
ability: Shuffle 1 of your Plays from a previous Round into your Playbook to Draw 1 Play.

name: Dog Gone Flip
ability: Flip a coin. If heads, you Recover 3 Hot Dogs. If tails, your opponent Recovers 3 Hot Dogs.

name: Combo Kick
ability: Your Hero gets +15. If this is your second Play this Battle, it gets an additional +5.

name: Overprepared
ability: Your opponent's Hero gets -5 for every Play you have run this Battle.

name: More Plays, Less Power
ability: Once this Play is run, if your opponent has more Plays in their hand than you, their Hero gets -10.

name: Lucky Discard
ability: Discard the top card of your Hero Deck. If it has the same weapon type as your active Hero, your Hero gets +20.

name: Power Pick
ability: Reveal the top 3 Plays of your Playbook. Add 1 to your hand and Discard the rest. If it's a Play with a cost of 3 or higher, your Hero gets +10.

name: Toss And Trade
ability: Flip a coin. If heads, send your current Hero to the Discard Pile and replace it with one from your hand. If tails, Discard 1 Play from your hand.

name: Lucky Shot
ability: Flip a coin and roll a dice. If the coin lands on heads and you roll a 4-6 on the dice, your Hero gets +30. If not, Discard 2 Plays from your hand.

name: Bench Blocker
ability: Your opponent's Hero gets -20. They can't Substitute next Battle.

name: Fallen Fighters
ability: Discard 1 Hero from your hand. Your current Hero gets +10 for every Hero in your Discard Pile with the same weapon type as the one you discarded.

name: Dead Red
ability: Name a weapon type. Now and for the rest of the game, if your opponent's Hero has that weapon type, they get -10. Otherwise, you Discard 1 Play.

name: Play Surge
ability: If your opponent uses 3 or more Plays this Battle, your Hero gets +15.

name: First Draw
ability: If this is the first play you've run this Battle, Draw 1 Play.

name: Play Re-Order
ability: Look at the top 3 Plays of your Playbook. Place them back on top in any order you want.

name: Discard Or 10
ability: Flip a coin. If heads, your Hero gets +10. If tails, you must Discard a random Play from your hand.

name: Maximum Effort
ability: Your Hero gets +10 this Battle, but you can't use any Plays next Battle.

name: 3-Dog-Special
ability: If you have exactly 3 Hot Dogs left, your Hero gets +10.

name: Substitution Boost
ability: For the rest of the game, any Hero that has been Substituted in gets +5.

name: Bench Scout
ability: Reveal the top 4 Heroes of your Hero Deck. Add 1 to your hand. Shuffle the rest into your Hero Deck.

name: Good Guess
ability: Name a weapon type. If your opponent's next Hero has that weapon type, that Hero gets -15.

name: Good Fortune
ability: If you won the last Battle, your Hero gets +10. If you lost, Draw 1 Play.

name: 10 For A Sub
ability: If you Substituted this Battle, your Hero gets +10.

name: Cheap Trick
ability: Reveal the top card of your Playbook. If it costs 2 or less, Draw it and your Hero gets +10. If not, shuffle it back into your Playbook.

name: Weapon Mixer
ability: Your Hero gets +5 for every different weapon type revealed this game.

name: Streaky
ability: If you've won 2 Battles in a row, your opponent's current Hero gets -10.

name: Hot Dog Dominance
ability: Your Hero gets +5 for every Hot Dog you have Discarded this Battle, including Substitutions.

name: Cheap Addition
ability: Reveal the top 5 Plays of your Playbook. Add one to your hand and shuffle the rest back into your Playbook.

name: Edge Rush
ability: Set your Hero's Power to 5 higher than your opponent's current Power.

name: Outside The Pocket
ability: Your Hero gets +30. If you lose this Battle, Discard all Plays in your hand.

name: Dragging Anchor
ability: Your opponent's Heroes in the next 2 Battles get -10.

name: Saving Bullets
ability: Your Hero gets +10 for every Battle you have lost.

name: 10 Per Play
ability: Your Hero gets +10 for every other Play you have used so far in this Battle.

name: Opening Strike
ability: If you won the first Battle, your Hero gets +30.

name: Roll Some Plays
ability: Roll a dice, draw Plays equivalent to that number. (Ex. If you roll a 3, draw 3 Plays.)

name: Updog
ability: Whichever player has fewer Hot Dogs Recovers 2 Hot Dogs and draws 1 Play.

name: Plan Ahead
ability: Choose a future Battle. When your Hero in that Battle is revealed, it gets +35.

name: Comeback Season
ability: If your opponent has won more Battles than you so far, your Hero gets +30.

name: Line Drive
ability: Roll a dice. If it lands on 3 or 4, your Hero gets +40. If not, it gets +5.

name: 1/6 For 15
ability: Roll a dice, if it lands on 1, your Hero's Power goes to 0. Otherwise, your Hero gets +15.

name: Money Line
ability: If you win this Battle, draw 2 Plays.

name: Make Up Meal
ability: Recover 1 Hot Dog for every Battle you have lost.

name: Combo Deal
ability: Your Hero gets +10. Draw 2 Plays.

name: Steel Shield
ability: For the rest of the game, Heroes with Steel weapons can't lose Power.

name: Unbreakable Ice
ability: For the rest of the game, Heroes with Ice weapons can't lose Power.

name: Eternal Flame
ability: For the rest of the game, Heroes with Fire weapons can't lose Power.

name: Heavy Swing
ability: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Hero gets -35.

name: 1 For 10
ability: Draw 1 additional Play, but your Hero loses -10.

name: 2 For 20
ability: Draw 2 additional Plays, but your Hero loses -20.

name: Overwhelm
ability: Your opponent must Discard 2 random Plays.

name: Frozen Lineup
ability: If your Hero has an Ice weapon, your opponent can't Substitute next Battle.

name: Torched
ability: If your Hero has a Fire weapon, your opponent can't Substitute next Battle.

name: Steel Cage
ability: If your Hero has a Steel weapon, your opponent can't Substitute next Battle.

name: Big Win Energy
ability: If you win this Battle, your next Hero gets +40.

name: Early Round Magic
ability: Your Hero gets +5 for every Battle still remaining in the game. (Ex. You use this on Battle 3, there are 4 Battles left, your Hero gets +20.)

name: Another Man's Treasure
ability: Swap your Hero with a Hero in your Discard Pile.

name: Save It For Later
ability: Your Hero loses -20. But if you win this Battle, your Hero in the next Battle gets +20.

name: Double Replacement
ability: Discard one Hero from your hand. Draw 2 new Heroes.

name: Transfer Portal
ability: Your Hero loses -30. Your Hero in the next Battle gets +30.

name: Damage On Discard
ability: Discard 2 Plays from your hand. Your opponent's Hero gets -30.

name: Radiant Comeback
ability: Swap your Hero with a Glow weapon Hero in your Discard Pile.

name: Icy Comeback
ability: Swap your Hero with an Ice weapon Hero in your Discard Pile.

name: Fire Comeback
ability: Swap your Hero with a Fire weapon Hero in your Discard Pile.

name: Polished Comeback
ability: Swap your Hero with a Steel weapon Hero in your Discard Pile.

name: Contract Limitations
ability: Your Hero gets +15 but you don't draw a Play at the start of next Battle.

name: High Fastball
ability: Roll a dice; opponent's Hero gets -5x the number. (Ex. If you roll a 4, their Hero gets -20.)

name: Greedy Gamble
ability: Flip a coin. If Heads, Recover 6 Hot Dogs.

name: Sticky Strength
ability: If your Hero has a Gum weapon, your opponent can't Substitute for the next 2 Battles.

name: Recycle
ability: Shuffle all Plays used in previous Battles back into your Playbook. Draw 2 Plays.

name: Make Up Call
ability: If you lose this Battle, Recover 1 Hot Dog.

name: Might Of The Underdog
ability: Draw the top Hero of your Hero Deck and Reveal it to your opponent. If its Power is 120 or lower, your Hero gets +30.

name: Frozen Flip
ability: Discard a Hero with an Ice weapon from your hand and flip a coin. If it's heads, your Hero gets +20.

name: Flaming Flip
ability: Discard a Hero with a Fire weapon from your hand and flip a coin. If it's heads, your Hero gets +20.

name: Stainless Flip
ability: Discard a Hero with a Steel weapon from your hand and flip a coin. If it's heads, your Hero gets +25.

name: Feast Or Famine
ability: If you win this Battle, Recover 2 Hot Dogs. If you lose, Discard 1 Hot Dog.

name: Winners Win
ability: If you've won at least 2 Battles, your Hero gets +15.

name: Hollow Bat
ability: Roll a dice. If it lands on 3-6, your Hero gets +25. If it lands on 1 or 2, your Hero gets -25.

name: 2 Plays
ability: Draw 2 Plays.

name: Lost Plays
ability: Both Players Discard the top 3 Plays of their Playbook.

name: One-And-One
ability: Flip a coin. If heads, your Hero gets +10. You may do this a second and final time if it lands on heads.

name: X-Ray Vision
ability: Look at your opponent's unrevealed Hero in the next Battle.

name: Risky Substitution
ability: Flip a coin. If heads, you can replace the Hero in the active Battle with one from your hand.

name: Ice Crew
ability: For every Hero with an Ice weapon you've used in all Battles so far, your Hero gets +10.

name: Steel Crew
ability: For every Hero with a Steel weapon you've used in all Battles so far, your Hero gets +10.

name: Fire Crew
ability: For every Hero with a Fire weapon you've used in all Battles so far, your Hero gets +10.

name: Steel Helmet
ability: If your Hero has a Steel weapon, flip a coin. If heads, your Hero can't lose any more Power this Battle.

name: Blind Substitution
ability: Discard your Hero. Replace it with the top card of your Hero Deck.

name: Double Down
ability: Flip a coin twice. If it lands on heads both times, your Hero gets +20. If both flips are tails, your Hero loses -40. (Nothing happens for any other result.)

name: Frost-Hardened
ability: For the rest of the game, if your Hero has a Steel weapon, it changes to an Ice weapon.

name: Nasty Or Nada
ability: Roll a dice 3 times. Your Hero gets +30 if you roll a 6.

name: Frostbiter
ability: Discard 1 Hero with an Ice weapon from your hand. Your opponent's Hero gets -15 this Battle.

name: Scrap Metal
ability: Discard 1 Hero with a Steel weapon from your hand. Your opponent's Hero gets -10 this Battle.

name: Burnout
ability: Discard 1 Hero with a Fire weapon from your hand. Your opponent's Hero gets -15 this Battle.

name: Molten Steel
ability: For the rest of the game, if your Hero has a Steel weapon, it changes to a Fire weapon.

name: Forced Retreat
ability: Your opponent must Discard their current Hero, and replace it with one from their hand.

name: Rusted Edge
ability: If your opponent's Hero has a Steel weapon, your Hero gets +15.

name: Fire Hose
ability: If your opponent's Hero has a Fire weapon, your Hero gets +15.

name: Icevantage
ability: If your opponent's Hero has an Ice weapon, your Hero gets +15.

name: Late Hit
ability: This must be used in Battle 7, your opponent's Hero gets -35.

name: Pre-Game Ritual
ability: Flip a coin 3 times; your Hero gets +15 if the coin lands on heads 2 or more times.

name: Burning Fever
ability: If your Hero has a Fire weapon, it can't drop below its current Power.

name: Frozen Resolve
ability: If your Hero has an Ice weapon, it can't drop below its current Power.

name: Chrome Will
ability: If your Hero has a Steel weapon, it can't drop below its current Power.

name: Super Lucky
ability: If your Hero has a Super weapon, flip a coin. If it's heads, your Hero gets +20.

name: Hex Flipper
ability: If your Hero has a Hex weapon, flip a coin. If it's heads, your Hero gets +20.

name: Lucky Gum
ability: If your Hero has a Gum weapon, flip a coin. If it's heads, your Hero gets +20.

name: Flip & Glow
ability: If your Hero has a Glow weapon, flip a coin. If it's heads, your Hero gets +20.

name: Steel Smash
ability: If your Hero has a Steel weapon, flip a coin. If it's heads, your Hero gets +20.

name: Firework
ability: If your Hero has a Fire weapon, flip a coin. If it's heads, your Hero gets +20.

name: Ice Blast
ability: If your Hero has an Ice weapon, flip a coin. If it's heads, your Hero gets +20.

name: Forced Substitution
ability: Your opponent must pay 2 Hot Dogs and Substitute next Battle.

name: Brothers In Arms
ability: If your opponent has played a Hero with the same weapon type as yours, your Hero gets +20.

name: No Retreat
ability: If you don't Substitute your Hero next Battle, it gets +10.

name: Cursed Coin
ability: Flip a coin 3 times; opponent's Hero gets -10 each time the coin lands on heads.

name: Fire Extinguisher
ability: If your opponent's Hero has a Fire weapon, give it -20.

name: Ice Pick
ability: If your opponent's Hero has an Ice weapon, give it -20.

name: Stain-Less-Steel
ability: If your opponent's Hero has a Steel weapon, give it -15.

name: Roster Cuts
ability: Discard the top 3 Heroes of your Hero Deck.

name: Ice Climber
ability: If your Hero has an Ice weapon and your opponent has Steel, your Hero gets +35.

name: Smitty
ability: If your Hero has a Fire weapon and your opponent has Steel, your Hero gets +35.

name: Last-Minute Re-Org
ability: Swap your Hero with another one of your face-down Heroes from a future Battle.

name: Over Under
ability: Send 2 Heroes from your hand to your Discard Pile. Draw 1 Play and 1 Hero.

name: Discard Rebate
ability: Shuffle a Hero from your Discard Pile back into your Hero Deck.

name: Three Strikes You're Out
ability: Discard a Hero from your hand. Flip a coin 3 times. If it lands on heads 3 times in a row, set opponent's Hero's Power to 0.

name: Even Money
ability: Flip a coin. If heads, your Hero gets +20. If tails, opponent's Hero gets +20.

name: Mutually Assured Dogstruction
ability: You and your opponent each discard 2 Hot Dogs.

name: Member Bounce
ability: All your Heroes get +10 for the rest of the game.

name: The 12th Man
ability: All your Opponent's Heroes get -10 for the rest of the game.

name: The Heroes Favorite Hot Dogs
ability: Recover a Hot Dog from your Discard Pile for every Hero in your Discard Pile.

name: Instant Refund
ability: For every Play you used this Battle, Recover 1 Hot Dog from your Discard Pile. (Ex: If you ran 2 Plays, you get 2 Hot Dogs back.)

name: Roller Dogs
ability: Roll a dice to Recover Hot Dogs from your Discard Pile: 1 or 2 = 1 Hot Dog, 3 or 4 = 2 Hot Dogs, 5 or 6 = 3 Hot Dogs.

name: 3 Weapon Streak
ability: If your Heroes in the 2 previous Battles had the same weapon type as this one, your Hero gets +25.

name: 5 Weapon Streak
ability: If your Heroes in the 5 previous Battles had the same weapon type as this one, your Hero gets +40.

name: Call it a Day
ability: The Hero with the highest current Power wins this Battle now (or it's a tie). Both players draw a Play and move to the next Battle.

name: Power Drain
ability: Your opponent's Hero loses -10, and your Hero gets +5 for each Hero in your opponent's Discard Pile.

name: Hero's Resolve
ability: If you win this Battle, your Hero's power can't be reduced by an opponent's Play in the next 2 Battles.

name: Return from the Depths
ability: If you have 3 or more Heroes in your Discard Pile, shuffle them into your Hero Deck, then draw 2 new Heroes.

name: Tear a Page
ability: Discard a Play from your hand and draw a new one.

name: Strength in Numbers
ability: Your current Hero gets +5 for every Hero and Play card in your Hand.

name: Hex Draw Play
ability: If your Hero in this Battle has a Hex weapon, draw a Play.

name: Glow Draw Play
ability: If your Hero in this Battle has an Glow weapon, draw a Play.

name: Gum Draw Play
ability: If your Hero in this Battle has a Gum weapon, draw a Play.

name: Bundle Deal
ability: Your next Play costs 1 less Hot Dog.

name: Sacrificed Heroes
ability: Discard 2 Heroes from your hand and Recover 1 Hot Dog from your Discard Pile.

name: Sacrifice it All to Win
ability: Reduce your Hero's power to 0. In the next Battle, your first Play is free.

name: Restricted List
ability: Next Battle, your opponent can only run a maximum of 1 Play.

name: Locked Playbook
ability: Your opponent can't draw any Plays this Battle, including at the end of their turn.

name: Bench Lock
ability: Your opponent can't Substitute next Battle.

name: Play Reset
ability: Both players shuffle all their Plays back into their Playbooks and draw the same number of Plays again. (Ex: Shuffle 3 Plays, draw 3 Plays.)

name: Risky Recovery
ability: Flip a coin. If heads, Recover 3 Hot Dogs from your Discard Pile. Your opponent draws 2 Plays no matter the result.

name: Cheap Draw
ability: Draw 3 Plays from your Playbook, but your opponent also draws 1 Play.

name: Hot Dog Thief
ability: Your opponent loses 1 Hot Dog. You gain 1 Hot Dog.

name: Drought
ability: Your opponent loses 2 Hot Dogs and can't Recover any Hot Dogs this Battle or next Battle.

name: Bonus Recovery
ability: For the rest of the game, whenever a Player Recovers any Hot Dogs, they Recover an extra Hot Dog. (Ex. If you would Recover 3 Hot Dogs, you get 4.)

name: Called Shot
ability: Declare the name of 1 Play. If your opponent has a Play in their hand with that name, they must Discard it.

name: Plays Or Dogs?
ability: Choose one of these options: Draw 2 Plays or Discard 2 Plays and Recover 3 Hot Dogs.

name: Win or Weiners
ability: If you lose this Battle, Recover 2 Hot Dogs. If you win, Draw a Play.

name: Competitive Disadvantage
ability: Your opponent's current Hero gets -10 for every Battle they've won.

name: Lose And Discard
ability: For the rest of the game, whenever a Player loses a Battle, they must also Discard a Hot Dog.

name: Rotten Dogs
ability: At the start of the next Battle, your opponent loses 2 Hot Dogs.

name: Dumpster Battle
ability: If possible, both Players replace their Hero in the active Battle with a Hero from their Discard Pile.

name: Head Start
ability: Both Heroes in this Battle return to their starting Power, then your Hero gets +10.

name: Fair Trade
ability: Your opponent Recovers 1 Hot Dog. Draw 2 Plays.

name: Storm The Field
ability: Discard all Heroes and Plays from your hand. Your Hero gets +5 for every card discarded this way.

name: Sub And Power-Up
ability: Swap your current Hero with one from your hand. Your new Hero gets +10.

name: Play Pluck
ability: Send 1 random Play from your opponent's hand to their Discard Pile.

name: Surging Power
ability: This can only be played in Battle 5 or 6. Your Hero gets +20. If you lose this battle, Discard 2 Plays from your hand.

name: Honorable
ability: You get Honors next turn. Draw a Play.

name: A Game Of War
ability: Both Players reveal the top card of their Hero Deck. Whichever Player reveals a Hero with higher Power Draws 1 Play. Both Players Discard their revealed Heroes.

name: Big Spender Bonus
ability: Discard the top 5 Plays of your Playbook. Your Hero gets +10 for any of those Plays with a cost of 3 or more.

name: Super Draw
ability: If your Hero has a Super weapon, Draw 2 Plays.

name: Hex Draw
ability: If your Hero has a Hex weapon, Draw 2 Plays.

name: Gum Draw
ability: If your Hero has a Gum weapon, Draw 2 Plays.

name: Clean Slate
ability: Both Players Discard all the Plays in their hands and Draw 3 new Plays.

name: Bull Market
ability: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Plays cost 1 extra Hot Dog this Battle and next Battle.

name: Transparency Clause
ability: Choose up to 2 Plays in your opponent's hand. Your opponent reveals them.

name: Copycat
ability: This card copies the effect and Hot Dog cost of the last Play you used.

name: My Idol
ability: Set your Hero's power to the same as your opponent's Hero's starting power.

name: Student Loan
ability: Next Battle only, you can spend up to 3 Hot Dogs more than what you have.

name: Ghost Dog
ability: This is now a Hot Dog. It can't be removed by your opponent's Plays. Discard this Play when you spend it.

name: Incendiary Dog
ability: This must be played on or after Battle 4. You and your opponent both lose 1 Hot Dog at the start of each Battle.

name: Ultimatum Dog
ability: For the rest of the game, Players lose any Battle in which they have 0 Hot Dogs left at the end of their turn.

name: Lunch Break
ability: Discard a Hero with a Glow weapon from your hand and Recover 3 Hot Dogs.

name: Scorching Pressure
ability: For the rest of the game, any time you have a Hero with a Fire weapon in the active Battle, your opponent's Hero loses -10.

name: Cold Pressure
ability: For the rest of the game, any time you have a Hero with an Ice weapon in the active Battle, your opponent's Hero loses -10.

name: Steel Pressure
ability: For the rest of the game, any time you have a Hero with a Steel weapon in the active Battle, your opponent's Hero loses -10.

name: Glow-Up
ability: If your Hero has a Glow weapon, it gets +20.

name: Lineup Randomizer
ability: Your opponent must Discard their unrevealed Heroes in future Battles and replace them with the top cards from their Hero Deck in order.

name: Play Lockdown
ability: Your opponent can't draw Plays until they win a Battle.

name: The Perfect Offense
ability: Cancel every Play your opponent used this Battle.

name: Hot Dog Stock Exchange
ability: This must be played in Battle 7. Your opponent switches their number of unused Hot Dogs with you.

name: Sweet Relish
ability: Any of your opponent's plays which lower your Power this Battle now raise your Power by that amount.

name: A Hard Bargain
ability: Your opponent flips the top card of their Hero Deck. If its Power is 130 or higher, they can't run any additional Plays this Battle. Discard the drawn Hero.

name: Pre-Game Spy
ability: Look at 2 random Plays in your opponent's hand.

name: Hungry Demands
ability: Your opponent must Discard 2 Hot Dogs.

name: Roll And Hope
ability: Roll a dice. If you roll a 6, swap current Power with your opponent.

name: Turn the Tide
ability: If you lost the first 3 Battles, give your Hero +60.

name: Drop The Giant
ability: If your opponent's Hero in the next Battle has a starting power above 160, it must be discarded and replaced with the top card of their Hero Deck.

name: Low Turnover
ability: If there are 0 Heroes in your Discard Pile, give your Hero +15.

name: High Turnover
ability: If you have 3 or more Heroes in your Discard Pile, give your Hero +25.

name: Lunch Table
ability: Give your Hero +20. All players get 2 Hot Dogs back from their Discard Pile at the start of next Battle.

name: Transfer Portal - htd
ability: Your Hero loses -30. Your Hero in the next Battle gets +30.

name: Recycle - htd
ability: Shuffle all Plays used in previous Battles back into your Playbook. Draw 2 Plays.

name: Contract Limitations - htd
ability: Your Hero gets +15 but you don't draw a Play at the start of next Battle.

name: Hollow Bat - htd
ability: Roll a dice. If it lands on 3-6, your Hero gets +25. If it lands on 1 or 2, your Hero gets -25.

name: Lost Plays - htd
ability: Both Players Discard the top 3 Plays of their Playbook.

name: One-And-One - htd
ability: Flip a coin. If heads, your Hero gets +10. You may do this a second and final time if it lands on heads.

name: Ice Crew - htd
ability: For every Hero with an Ice weapon you've used in all Battles so far, your Hero gets +10.

name: Steel Crew - htd
ability: For every Hero with a Steel weapon you've used in all Battles so far, your Hero gets +10.

name: Fire Crew - htd
ability: For every Hero with a Fire weapon you've used in all Battles so far, your Hero gets +10.

name: Blind Substitution - htd
ability: Discard your Hero. Replace it with the top card of your Hero Deck.

name: Frost-Hardened - htd
ability: For the rest of the game, if your Hero has a Steel weapon, it changes to an Ice weapon.

name: Nasty Or Nada - htd
ability: Roll a dice 3 times. Your Hero gets +30 if you roll a 6.

name: Molten Steel - htd
ability: For the rest of the game, if your Hero has a Steel weapon, it changes to a Fire weapon.

name: Forced Retreat - htd
ability: Your opponent must Discard their current Hero, and replace it with one from their hand.

name: Burning Fever - htd
ability: If your Hero has a Fire weapon, it can't drop below its current Power.

name: Frozen Resolve - htd
ability: If your Hero has an Ice weapon, it can't drop below its current Power.

name: Forced Substitution - htd
ability: Your opponent must pay 2 Hot Dogs and Substitute next Battle.

name: Brothers In Arms - htd
ability: If your opponent has played a Hero with the same weapon type as yours, your Hero gets +20.

name: Cursed Coin - htd
ability: Flip a coin 3 times; opponent's Hero gets -10 each time the coin lands on heads.

name: Fire Extinguisher - htd
ability: If your opponent's Hero has a Fire weapon, give it -20.

name: Ice Pick - htd
ability: If your opponent's Hero has an Ice weapon, give it -20.

name: Stain-Less-Steel - htd
ability: If your opponent's Hero has a Steel weapon, give it -15.

name: Roster Cuts - htd
ability: Discard the top 3 Heroes of your Hero Deck.

name: Ice Climber - htd
ability: If your Hero has an Ice weapon and your opponent has Steel, your Hero gets +35.

name: Smitty - htd
ability: If your Hero has a Fire weapon and your opponent has Steel, your Hero gets +35.

name: Last-Minute Re-Org
ability: Swap your Hero with another one of your face-down Heroes from a future Battle.

name: Over Under - htd
ability: Send 2 Heroes from your hand to your Discard Pile. Draw 1 Play and 1 Hero.

name: Radiant Comeback - htd
ability: Swap your Hero with a Glow weapon Hero in your Discard Pile.

name: Icy Comeback - htd
ability: Swap your Hero with an Ice weapon Hero in your Discard Pile.

name: Fire Comeback - htd
ability: Swap your Hero with a Fire weapon Hero in your Discard Pile.

name: Gavel of Justice - htd
ability: Lower the opponent's Hero by -30.

name: Heads I Win, Tails You Lose - htd
ability: Flip a coin: If heads, your Hero gets +15. If tails, your opponent's Hero loses -5.

name: Only Upside - htd
ability: Pick a number from 1 to 6, then roll a dice. If it lands on your number, your Hero gets +20. If not, draw a Play from your Playbook.

name: 3rd Time Charm - htd
ability: Flip a coin 3 times. If all 3 flips land on heads, your Hero's Power is doubled. Each time the coin lands on tails, draw a Play.

name: Only Fire - htd
ability: For the rest of the game all Heroes have Fire Weapons.

name: Only Ice - htd
ability: For the rest of the game all Heroes have Ice Weapons.

name: Only Steel - htd
ability: For the rest of the game all Heroes have Steel Weapons.

name: Flame Wall - htd
ability: If your Hero has a Fire weapon, your opponent can't run any Plays this Battle.

name: Icy Shield - htd
ability: If your Hero has an Ice weapon, your opponent can't run any Plays this Battle.

name: Steel Defense - htd
ability: If your Hero has a Steel weapon, your opponent can't run any Plays this Battle.

name: Curveball - htd
ability: Replace your Hero with any Hero from your hand and draw 1 Hero.

name: Loan Sharked - htd
ability: For the rest of the Game if a coin is flipped, lower the opponent's Hero in the active Battle by -5.

name: Shooters Shoot - htd
ability: Flip a coin 4 times; your opponent's Hero gets -5 each time the coin lands on tails.

name: Heads-Up! - htd
ability: Flip a coin 4 times; your Hero gets +5 each time the coin lands on heads.

name: To Fight Another Day - htd
ability: If you lost the previous Battle, your Hero in the active Battle gets +20.

name: 1-4-1 Play - htd
ability: Draw a Play from your Playbook.

name: Adding Depth - htd
ability: Draw a card from either your Playbook or your Hero Deck.

name: Late Game Lockdown - htd
ability: Your opponent cannot Substitute in Battle 7.

name: Prevent D - htd
ability: Your opponent can't run any Plays in Battle 7.

name: Rebuild - htd
ability: If you lost the previous Battle, Discard all Heroes in your hand and draw 4 new Heroes from your Hero Deck.

name: Worth The Risk? - htd
ability: Roll a dice: if you get a 1 or 6, your Hero's power drops to 0. If you roll a 2-5, you gain +25.

name: Tough Call - htd
ability: Reveal the top 3 Plays of your Playbook; choose 1 and add it to your hand then Discard the other 2.

name: Indestructible - htd
ability: This Hero can't have its power reduced by an opponent's Play.

name: Going Back to Back - htd
ability: This Hero gets any extra Power your previous Hero had.

name: Easy Choice - htd
ability: No matter the outcome of this Battle, you decide who gets Honors (goes first) in the next Battle.

name: Pulling The Plug - htd
ability: Any Plays that are affecting the rest of the Game are now cancelled going forward (including your own).

name: Rally Cap - htd
ability: If your Hero in this Battle is losing by 15 or more it gets +20.

name: Rob Peter Pay Paul - htd
ability: This Hero gets +15, but your Hero in the next Battle gets -5.

name: Make It, Take It - htd
ability: For the rest of the game, whenever you win a Battle, your Hero in the next Battle gets +5.

name: QB Sneak - htd
ability: If this Battle is tied, your Hero gets +1.
